description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a mix of brick and glass exterior walls. The front facade includes a green wall planter, a small window with a flower box, and a main entrance door. The interior is divided into distinct rooms, including a bedroom, bathroom, living area, and a spacious room with large floor-to-ceiling windows, likely serving as a sunroom or office. The roof is flat, and the windows are arranged asymmetrically, with larger windows on the side and rear. The building is compact, with a modern yet cozy appearance, and is suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern single-story brick bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a green wall planter on the front facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, green wall planter, flower box, and a mix of brick and glass surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick exterior, bedroom windows, and the absence of large glass panels.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring expansive floor-to-ceiling glass windows and a clear view into the sunroom or office area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with brick walls and two windows, providing a look into the living and bedroom areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side and rear windows
